name: VibroSense Full Chain Integration
description: End-to-end simulation: MEMS model → PGA → 5 BPFs → 5 Envelope detectors → RMS/Crest → MAC Classifier. Apply CWRU test vectors. All blocks use final real netlists (not behavioral).
margin_rule: All blocks must already pass individually before integration. Report end-to-end accuracy.

total_power_uw.description: Total always-on chip power (hard limit 600uW, target 300uW)

end_to_end_accuracy_pct.description: 4-class classification accuracy on CWRU vectors through full analog chain

detection_latency_ms.description: Time from fault onset to classifier output change

false_alarm_rate_pct.description: False positive rate on normal-condition test vectors
